scenarios.name: dup-and-scale-panel
scenarios.rationale: Response A meets most rubric items (PropertyGroup, operator, panel, registration) but misnames the property; Response B omits the PropertyGroup, uses wrong names, and lacks required panel context.

scenarios.name: menu-and-keymap-cube
scenarios.rationale: Response B covers more rubric items, including a keymap and register/unregister functions, whereas Response A lacks keymap integration and a proper menu class.
